text.title: Quit Day Job Trigger Contract Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the contract artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces named trigger, evidence anchors, named owner, and review cadence.

example.note: owner is a team not a person, trigger.kind not in enum, threshold null, evidence_links empty, reversal_clause empty, review.cadence not in enum.

forbidden.pattern: trigger 'when needed' OR trigger.kind not in {threshold, event, schedule}
owner is a team / channel rather than a person
review.last_run_at older than the cadence window

allowed-transformations.transformation: Default version to 1.0.0 on first commit.
